name: entry-point-analyzer
description: Analyzes smart contract codebases to identify state-changing entry points for security auditing. Detects externally callable functions that modify state, categorizes them by access level (public, admin, role-restricted, contract-only), and generates structured audit reports. Excludes view/pure/read-only functions. Use when auditing smart contracts (Solidity, Vyper, Solana/Rust, Move, TON, CosmWasm) or when asked to find entry points, audit flows, external functions, access control patterns, or p
author: trailofbits
summary_zh: 这是一款智能合约安全审计工具，能自动找出会修改状态的函数入口并按权限分类，帮你快速定位审计重点，省去排查只读函数的麻烦。
